items.title: VI Live: Atlético maakt derde goal, Barcelona wordt totaal overlopen
items.summary: Barcelona neemt het donderdagavond om 21.00 uur op in de halve finale van de Copa del Rey tegen Atlético Madrid. Over twee duels hoopt de ploeg van Hansi Flick zich te plaatsen voor de finale. Ook Premier League-koploper Arsenal komt op dat tijdstip in actie. Volg het in deze VI Live.

items.title: Atlético Madrid v Manchester United: Women’s Champions League – live

items.title: García's zorgen voor een van meest lachwekkende eigen goals uit Barça-historie
items.summary: Het heenduel in de halve finale van de Copa del Rey tussen Atlético Madrid en Barcelona is donderdagavond uiterst merkwaardig begonnen. Eric García en Joan García zorgden samen voor een van de meest lachwekkende eigen doelpunten ooit uit de geschiedenis van de Catalanen.

items.title: Brentford v Arsenal: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Premier League updates from the 8pm (GMT) kick-off ⚽ Tables | Top scorers | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail Scott 3 min: … but then Gabriel inexplicably toe-punts a wild backpass out for a corner. So careless. An early chance for Brentford to cause some of that six-yard-box chaos their manager was talking about before the game. 2 min: Brentford stroke it around a bit. Then Arsenal stroke it around a bit. One of those starts. Continue reading...

items.title: Portugese topper levert ook voor meer dan 40 duizend euro aan boetes op
items.summary: FC Porto en Sporting Portugal hebben allebei boetes gekregen na de onderlinge topper van afgelopen maandag. Het thuisteam van Francesco Farioli moet het leeuwendeel betalen.

items.title: NI relish 'competitive' Nations League draw - O'Neill
items.summary: Northern Ireland manager Michael O'Neill says "there are no easy games" in the Nations League after being drawn with Hungary, Ukraine and Georgia.

items.title: Man Utd komt kort na excuses Ratcliffe met statement over inclusiviteit
items.summary: Manchester United heeft in een statement duidelijk gemaakt dat het absoluut een inclusieve club is. Dat alles naar aanleiding van pikante uitspraken van mede-eigenaar Sir Jim Ratcliffe, die daarvoor zijn excuses aanbood.

items.title: Thomas Tuchel targets World Cup glory after signing contract extension until 2028
items.summary: Head coach’s deal was due to finish after World Cup England get Spain, Croatia and Czechs in Nations League Thomas Tuchel believes he can lead England to a victorious World Cup this summer in what he hopes will be the first of multiple successes with the national team after signing a ­surprise contract extension. The fresh deal means Tuchel will stay in charge until after Euro 2028, which England will co-host, barring an unexpected change in fortunes. It puts to bed speculation that he could be tempted by a high-profile club vacancy and provides all ­parties with certainty before their tilt at football’s biggest prize begins in June. Continue reading...

items.title: FA: Tuchel's new deal not related to Man Utd job
items.summary: Football Association chief executive Mark Bullingham said there are "performance conditions" connected to Thomas Tuchel staying on as England head coach beyond the World Cup.

items.title: Ange: Frank sacking 'fair,' but Spurs lack vision
items.summary: Ange Postecoglou has labelled Thomas Frank's sacking a "fair departure" but sympathised with the Dane for having to work in an "environment of uncertainty."

items.title: Sterling joins Feyenoord after Chelsea exit
items.summary: Raheem Sterling has agreed deal to join Feyenoord until end of season, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Sources: Pereira set to be named new Forest boss
items.summary: Ex-Wolves boss Vitor Pereira has agreed to join Nottingham Forest to replace Sean Dyche, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: United affirm 'inclusive' values amid Ratcliffe storm
items.summary: Manchester United said Thursday that the club takes pride in being "inclusive and welcoming" following co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe's claim that the UK has been "colonized by immigrants."

items.title: Man Utd ahead in first WCL knockout game vs Atletico LIVE!
Hoe Hoefkens juist in cruciale week de rauwe kant van NAC trotseerde
items.summary: Carl Hoefkens (47) staat onder hevige druk bij NAC Breda. De trainer is intern geliefd en wordt door zijn spelersgroep alom geprezen, maar wist in 42 competitiewedstrijden slechts vier keer te winnen. In acute degradatienood moet de volksclub daardoor ook verder durven te kijken dan het tactische gameplan van de passionele Belg. Alleen schiet het daarmee wat op?

items.title: Who is fastest and who has most laps at Bahrain test so far?
items.summary: Find out the driver line-ups for the first F1 Bahrain test, who has the best lap times and which teams have completed the most laps so far.

items.title: Super League: York Knights open scoring vs Hull KR LIVE!
Footballer Thomas Partey charged with two further counts of rape
items.summary: Villarreal player charged in July with five counts of rape Former Arsenal midfielder denies all the charges The footballer Thomas Partey has been charged with two new counts of rape relating to an additional woman who came forward to police with the allegations in August last year. Partey will appear at Westminster magistrates court on 13 March in relation to the additional charges issued by the Crown Prosecution Service over allegations that date from 2020. Continue reading...

items.title: England to face Spain and Croatia in Nations League
items.summary: England will face Spain, Croatia and the Czech Republic in the 2026-27 Uefa Nations League group stage, while Wales are drawn with holders Portugal.

items.title: 'Motivated' Verstappen airs concerns over new F1 cars
items.summary: Four-time world champion Max Verstappen has insisted he is "motivated" for the new Formula 1 season despite revealing concerns about the sport's new regulations for the 2026 season.
